title: 水族馆钓鱼
coreLoop: 海岸高斯场景中自由走动探索
走入 WM_Fishing 路标范围触发钓鱼小游戏
抛竿 → 等待咬钩 → 提竿 → 搏斗收线
离开钓点返回探索模式
acceptanceTests: SOG splat loads right-side up via GaussianLoaderV2 X-flip
Desktop WASD + mouse look in explore mode
Mobile joystick + touch look in explore mode
Enter WM_Fishing opens fishing HUD; exit returns to explore
Fishing cast → wait → hook → fight → result loop completes
